---
author:
  - Patrick J. Roddy
  - "[James Legg](https://github.com/cjlegg)"
  - "[Kevin Mulder](https://github.com/kmulderdas)"
date: 2018-07-18
path: ucl-cdt-data-intensive-science-group-projects/index.qmd
subtitle: >-
  [UCL CDT in Data Intensive Science Group
  Projects](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/data-intensive-science-industry/group-projects-industry-placements)
title: Intrusion Detection from Network Logs
---

{{< pdf index.pdf height=500 width=100% >}}
